User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system, whether a citizen, worker, or administrator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user (matches Firebase Auth UID).

role.description: The type of user (citizen, official, worker).

name.description: The display name of the user.

points.description: Gamification points earned by the user.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a road damage report submitted by a citizen.

userId.description: The UID of the user who submitted the report.

userName.description: The name of the user who submitted the report.

location.description: Geo-tagged location of the reported damage (e.g., latitude, longitude).

latitude.description: The latitude of the reported damage.

longitude.description: The longitude of the reported damage.

roadName.description: The name of the road where the damage is located, extracted from reverse geocoding.

category.description: The type of damage reported (e.g., Pothole, Crack).

imageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded image of the road damage.

timestamp.description: The time the report was created

status.description: Status of the report (e.g., Pending, In Progress, Resolved, Rejected).

aiAnalysis.description: The AI analysis of the report

department.description: The department responsible for addressing the report.

remarks.description: Remarks or notes added by an SMC officer during verification.

causeTag.description: The likely cause of the damage (e.g., Rain/Flood, Construction).

assignedContractor.description: The name of the contractor assigned to the report.

priority.description: The priority level of the report.

estimatedResolutionTime.description: The estimated time for resolution suggested by an official.

afterImageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded image showing the completed work.

actionLog.description: A log of all actions taken on the report.

citizenRating.description: The 1-5 star rating given by the citizen after resolution.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Path-based ownership for user data.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Stores road damage reports. Includes denormalized 'userName' for display and 'userId' for authorization.
